payload.text:
[TASK COMPLETION REPORT]
changed files:
- front/components/ControlPanel.tsx

behavior changes:
- Replaced the old single aspect-ratio selector with Advanced Settings grouped resolution presets.
- Added three always-visible preset groups: 1K, HD, 2K.
- Added exact resolution options/labels: 1024x1024, 1024x576, 576x1024, 1024x768, 768x1024, 1920x1088, 1088x1920, 2048x2048, 2048x1152, 1152x2048.
- Active group now uses highlighted style; inactive groups remain muted. Selecting an option updates existing aspectRatio mapping only (no backend/API contract changes).

validation steps:
1) Build check: run "npm run build" in front/ -> passed (vite build success).
2) Static check: confirmed all required resolution values and group labels exist in ControlPanel.tsx.
3) UI logic check: confirmed activeResolutionGroup + conditional classes implement active/muted group styles.
